title: Chain 1/8: Open an Account
scene: 你刚到美国，去银行开支票账户。（对话链：银行办事）

turns.cn: 您好，今天需要什么服务？
turns.en: Hello. How can I help you today?

turns.cn: 我想开一个支票账户。
turns.en: I'd like to open a checking account.

turns.cn: 请出示护照和地址证明。
turns.en: I'll need your passport and proof of address.

turns.cn: 这是我的租房合同，可以吗？
turns.en: Here's my lease agreement. Will that work?

turns.cn: 可以。最低存款二十五美元。
turns.en: Yes. The minimum deposit is twenty-five dollars.

turns.cn: 学生账户有月费吗？
turns.en: Is there a monthly fee for student accounts?

turns.cn: 学生账户免月费。
turns.en: Student accounts have no monthly fee.

title: Chain 2/8: Deposit a Check
scene: 开户后，你要存入第一笔工资支票。（对话链：银行办事）

turns.cn: 您好，需要什么服务？
turns.en: Hi. What can I do for you?

turns.cn: 我想存这张支票。
turns.en: I'd like to deposit this check.

turns.cn: 请填背面，账号在这。
turns.en: Please endorse the back. Account number here.

turns.cn: 多久到账？
turns.en: How long until it clears?

turns.cn: 一两个工作日，手机会通知。
turns.en: One or two business days. You'll get an app alert.

turns.cn: 好的，谢谢。
turns.en: Okay. Thank you.

title: Chain 3/8: ATM Problem
scene: 几天后，你的卡被门口 ATM 吞了。（对话链：银行办事）

turns.cn: 你好，我的卡卡在 ATM 里了。
turns.en: Hi, my card got stuck in the ATM.

turns.cn: 哪一台？什么时候的事？
turns.en: Which machine? When did it happen?

turns.cn: 门口那台，大概十分钟前。
turns.en: The one by the entrance, about ten minutes ago.

turns.cn: 我查一下……卡已经取出来了。
turns.en: Let me check. We've already retrieved it.

turns.cn: 钱有扣吗？我取了两百。
turns.en: Was any money deducted? I was withdrawing two hundred.

turns.cn: 没有扣款，您可以重新取。
turns.en: No charge went through. You can try again.

turns.cn: 谢谢，吓死我了。
turns.en: Thanks. That was scary!

title: Chain 4/8: Wire Transfer
scene: 你要往国内汇一笔钱，咨询手续费。（对话链：银行办事）

turns.cn: 我想电汇三千美元到中国。
turns.en: I need to wire three thousand dollars to China.

turns.cn: 请填写收款人姓名和银行信息。
turns.en: Please fill in the recipient's name and bank details.

turns.cn: 手续费多少？几天到账？
turns.en: What's the fee, and how long does it take?

turns.cn: 手续费四十五，三到五个工作日。
turns.en: Forty-five dollars, three to five business days.

turns.cn: 汇率按今天的算吗？
turns.en: Is the exchange rate based on today's rate?

turns.cn: 对，按处理时的实时汇率。
turns.en: Yes, the rate at the time of processing.

turns.cn: 好的，请帮我办理。
turns.en: Okay, please go ahead.

title: Chain 5/8: Question a Charge
scene: 你发现账单有一笔不认识的交易。（对话链：银行办事）

turns.cn: 银行客服，请问有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Bank support. How can I help?

turns.cn: 账单上有一笔四十九块九，我不认识。
turns.en: There's a charge for forty-nine ninety I don't recognize.

turns.cn: 请报后四位卡号和交易日期。
turns.en: Last four digits of your card and the transaction date?

turns.cn: 卡尾号5678，上周三。
turns.en: Card ending in five six seven eight, last Wednesday.

turns.cn: 像是流媒体订阅，要争议吗？
turns.en: Looks like a streaming subscription. Want to dispute it?

turns.cn: 哦想起来了，不用争议。
turns.en: Oh, I remember now. No dispute needed.

title: Chain 6/8: Report Lost Card
scene: 你丢了钱包，打电话挂失借记卡。（对话链：银行办事）

turns.cn: 挂失专线，请报姓名和生日。
turns.en: Card loss hotline. Name and date of birth?

turns.cn: 张伟，三月十五号，卡可能丢了。
turns.en: Zhang Wei, March fifteenth. I think I lost my card.

turns.cn: 已冻结，新卡五到七天寄到。
turns.en: It's frozen. A new card ships in five to seven days.

turns.cn: 能加急吗？我下周要出差。
turns.en: Can you expedite it? I travel next week.

turns.cn: 加急两天，收十五块。
turns.en: Express is two days for fifteen dollars.

turns.cn: 好，请加急。
turns.en: Yes, please expedite.

title: Chain 7/8: Activate New Card
scene: 新卡到了，你去银行激活并设 PIN。（对话链：银行办事）

turns.cn: 您好，需要什么服务？
turns.en: Hi. What can I do for you?

turns.cn: 我收到新借记卡，想激活设密码。
turns.en: I got my new debit card. I'd like to activate it and set a PIN.

turns.cn: 请插卡，按提示操作。
turns.en: Insert the card and follow the prompts.

turns.cn: 好了，旧卡自动作废了吧？
turns.en: Done. The old card is cancelled, right?

turns.cn: 对，旧卡已失效。
turns.en: Yes, the old one is deactivated.

turns.cn: 谢谢。
turns.en: Thank you.

title: Chain 8/8: Set Up Mobile Banking
scene: 临走前，你请工作人员帮忙装手机银行 App。（对话链：银行办事）

turns.cn: 能帮我设置手机银行吗？刷脸登录不会弄。
turns.en: Can you help me set up mobile banking? I'm not sure about face login.

turns.cn: 先下载 App，用账号密码登录。
turns.en: Download the app first and log in with your username and password.

turns.cn: 转账限额默认多少？
turns.en: What's the default transfer limit?

turns.cn: 每天两千五，可在设置里调高。
turns.en: Twenty-five hundred a day. You can raise it in settings.

turns.cn: 明白了，谢谢。
turns.en: Got it. Thank you.

turns.cn: 有问题随时来或打电话。
turns.en: Come in or call anytime if you need help.
